ET Graphics: BoP stability tested by outflows & Rupee fall
articles.summary: India's external accounts are under strain. The current account deficit is widening, and capital may flow out. The rupee has weakened significantly. Policymakers are considering various measures beyond interest rate hikes to stabilize the currency. These include incentives for foreign deposits and liberalizing capital inflows. State-owned banks may also issue foreign currency bonds.

articles.title: GDS Was Already Up 47% — Pinpoint Tripled Its Stake Anyway
Pfizer Stock Is Staring at a Big Week After Friday’s Drop
articles.summary: Pfizer's stock dropped 1.63% on Friday, closing at $25.33, after its shares had slid throughout the week despite a stronger-than-expected first quarter. The company reaffirmed its 2026 revenue and earnings guidance, focusing on oncology, obesity, and dividends, but investors are looking for more clinical data and less pipeline risk. Macroeconomic factors, including rising Treasury yields, and competition from Eli Lilly in the GLP-1 drug market, are adding pressure, making the stock's performance this week largely dependent on broader market trends and future news regarding its pipeline.
articles.content: Pfizer's stock dropped 1.63% on Friday, closing at $25.33, after its shares had slid throughout the week despite a stronger-than-expected first quarter. The company reaffirmed its 2026 revenue and earnings guidance, focusing on oncology, obesity, and dividends, but investors are looking for more clinical data and less pipeline risk. Macroeconomic factors, including rising Treasury yields, and competition from Eli Lilly in the GLP-1 drug market, are adding pressure, making the stock's performance this week largely dependent on broader market trends and future news regarding its pipeline.

articles.summary: CoStar Group is set to be removed from the Nasdaq-100 index before Monday's open, with Lumentum Holdings taking its place. This change could prompt index funds to adjust their holdings in CoStar (CSGP). While the company saw a 2.6% stock jump on Friday and reported 23% year-over-year revenue growth in Q1, its residential real estate segment recorded an adjusted EBITDA loss, contributing to investor focus on the performance of Homes.com and institutional flows.

The article highlights its core business model, recent financial performance, dividend growth, and competitive positioning within the evolving healthcare industry.

articles.title: Methanex Corp stock (CA59151K1084): earnings momentum and methanol cycle in focus
articles.summary: Methanex Corp (MEOH), a major methanol producer, has released quarterly results and updated its 2026 outlook, drawing investor attention to methanol prices, cash generation, and capital allocation. The company's earnings are closely tied to the cyclical nature of methanol prices, which are influenced by demand from chemical industries and fuel sectors, its production volumes, and global supply chain efficiency. Methanex's strategy balances long-term contracts with spot market exposure, navigating market volatility with a diversified production base and integrated logistics.
articles.content: Methanex Corp (MEOH), a major methanol producer, has released quarterly results and updated its 2026 outlook, drawing investor attention to methanol prices, cash generation, and capital allocation. The company's earnings are closely tied to the cyclical nature of methanol prices, which are influenced by demand from chemical industries and fuel sectors, its production volumes, and global supply chain efficiency. articles.title: Kroger Co stock (US4963911080): analysts see upside while investors weigh earnings and merger outloo
articles.summary: Kroger Co. (KR) stock is trading in the mid-$60s, with analysts predicting a moderate upside of about 12.8% to $74.56 over the next 12 months. Investors are closely watching the company's financial performance and the ongoing regulatory review of its proposed merger with Albertsons. Kroger's business model relies on its vast network of physical stores, significant private-label brand portfolio, and growing digital capabilities to maintain its position in the competitive US food retail market.
